description: You are a Technical Community Manager identifying influencers from the Irish Linux Users Group (ILUG) mailing list. Move all 'ILUG' related emails from your Inbox to a new folder named 'Scout-ILUG' and star the original thread starters (Subject does not start with 'Re:' or 'RE:'). Create a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/ilug_candidates.csv listing the Name and Email Address of the senders of the starred emails in 'Name, Email' format. Draft a notification email to devrel@company.com with the subject 'ILUG Candidate List'.
